channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network 动画 Expo Hosts Musical Artists ALI, Yōko Kanno
item.description: ALI, Kanno, Roselia, SPYAIR, Yoko Takahashi to perform at J-POP SOUND CAPSULE @ AX 2026 concert ― Anime Expo announced on Monday that artists ALI and Yōko Kanno will also perform at the J-POP SOUND... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Anime Expo Hosts Musical Artists ALI, Yōko Kanno

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network RetroCrush Streams Medabots 动画 on FAST Channel on June 7
item.description: RetroCrush streaming service also adds Night on the Galactic Railroad, Spider Riders anime ― Cineverse's RetroCrush streaming service announced on Tuesday that the Medabots anime will begin streaming... | 来源: ANN | 原文: RetroCrush Streams Medabots Anime on FAST Channel on June 7
